task: place the milk dairy in the sink
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plastic container (sink) is on the right. A small brown object (milk dairy) is on the wooden table near the sink. The table is a flat surface. STRATEGY - Reach the milk dairy, grasp it, transport it to the sink, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the dairy during transport or misplacing it outside the sink. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the dairy body; Step 2 grasp the dairy body for secure hold; Step 3 transport above the sink; Step 4 lower into the sink interior.
Goal: inside(milk_dairy, sink)
Scene: milk_dairy, sink, table
Step 1: reach(milk_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the milk dairy
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, milk_dairy, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, milk_dairy) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(milk_dairy)
  affordance_region: the body of the milk dairy
  contact: holding(milk_dairy) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(milk_dairy)
Step 3: transport(milk_dairy -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink
  spatial: above(milk_dairy, sink, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(milk_dairy)
  done_when: above(milk_dairy, sink, 0.05)
Step 4: place(milk_dairy -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink
  contact: surface_contact(milk_dairy, sink) [completion]; released(milk_dairy) [completion]
  pose: inside(milk_dairy, sink) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(milk_dairy, sink) AND released(milk_dairy)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the milk dairy
the body of the milk dairy
an empty area inside the sink
